description_long: This is a modern, freestanding refrigerator with a sleek, matte black finish. The front features two vertical French doors on the upper section, each equipped with long, straight handles, and a wide pull-out freezer drawer at the bottom. The sides and back are flat and unadorned, maintaining a minimalist aesthetic. The refrigerator appears to be constructed primarily from metal, likely steel, with plastic and rubber components for the handles, seals, and interior. No visible branding, control panels, or vent patterns are present on the exterior. The overall design is contemporary and would fit well in both residential and urban utility settings.
description: A matte black, French door refrigerator with a bottom freezer drawer and minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical French doors with long handles and a wide bottom freezer drawer.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the flat, unadorned surface and the profile of the protruding handles.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, featureless back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flat side and handle profiles.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, straight, vertically oriented protruding handles centered on each French door and a horizontal handle on the freezer drawer.
